notes: Implemented Stage 7 on branch codex/stage7-meta-progression. Added persistent meta progression service (PlayerPrefs JSON) with Salvage Points calculation, upgrade catalog/purchase persistence, tier/endless unlocks, and best endless loop tracking. Added run launch configuration for campaign/endless mode and difficulty tiers (Normal/Infestation/Swarm) plus endless loop scaling. Integrated GameManager with meta upgrade injection at run start: Starting Bonus, Scrap Magnet, Reinforced Tripwire, Expanded Draft (4 cards), Shotgun Spread, Camera Upgrade radius, Pet Resilience respawn, and Fortified Walls weak-point hits. Added tier/loop-aware floor labels and scaled alien/wave cloning for tier wave-count and stat multipliers. Updated HUD draft layout for 3-4 cards and run-end overlay to show Salvage stats and loop stats. Updated MainMenu controller with functional Campaign/Endless/Meta Upgrades flow, tier selector, and lock-aware buttons. Added functional MetaUpgrades runtime UI with salvage balance, upgrade list, purchase states, and persistence. Added Stage 7 EditMode and PlayMode tests covering salvage math, persistence, upgrade effects, tier multipliers, save round-trip, run salvage award, starting bonus in new run, and infestation stat buffs. Verification: zero compile errors in Unity console, EditMode 29/29 passing, PlayMode 18/18 passing; no gameplay script/runtime errors in console after runs (only Unity test-results save log entry).
